name: Embed via Executa
description: Exposes an `embed` tool that wraps host embeddings/create via reverse-RPC, letting the Embed Demo app compute embeddings through an Executa instead of calling anna.llm.embed directly.
_comment: Publish metadata (slug/name/version/executa_type) is read by `anna-app apps publish`; the dev fields (tool_id/type/enabled) are read by `anna-app dev`. The `distribution` block (type:binary + binary_urls) makes the Agent install a self-contained PyInstaller binary per platform from this repo's GitHub Release (tag `embed-via-executa-v<version>`), built by .github/workflows/anna-app-publish.yml; on `anna-app apps cut` matrix-nexus mirrors the bytes into apps.anna.partners R2 and pins sha256 (so no self-hosting / no sha256 needed here). This dir is the `embed-via-executa` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas. Disable here if you want to test the app without the Executa-embed path.
